# Contributor Covenant Code of Conduct

## Our Pledge

We pledge to make participation in this project and community a harassment-free experience for everyone, regardless of age, body size, visible or invisible disability, ethnicity, gender identity and expression, level of experience, education, socioeconomic status, nationality, personal appearance, race, caste, colour, religion, or sexual identity and orientation.

## Our Standards

Examples of positive behaviour include using welcoming language, respecting differing viewpoints, accepting constructive criticism, focusing on what is best for the community, and showing empathy.

Unacceptable behaviour includes harassment, hate speech, sexualized language or imagery, publishing private information without permission, personal attacks, and other conduct that would reasonably be considered inappropriate in a professional setting.

## Enforcement

Project maintainers may remove, edit, or reject contributions and may temporarily or permanently ban participants whose behaviour violates this Code of Conduct. Report incidents privately to [maxxborer@gmail.com](mailto:maxxborer@gmail.com). Reports will be reviewed promptly and handled with discretion.

## Attribution

This Code of Conduct is adapted from the [Contributor Covenant, version 2.1](https://www.contributor-covenant.org/version/2/1/code_of_conduct.html).
